reviews.comment:
El acceso no es bueno...los playeros parece que te hacen un favor. No atienden mal, pero están lejos de ser cordiales. Los automovilistas te dicen de todo mientras esperas ingresar a la playa. A los posadeños les falta mucho sentido del turismo...yo vine a gastar y no sentí ninguna correspondencia.

(Translated by Google)
Access is bad...the beach attendants act like they're doing you a favor. They're not rude, but they're far from friendly. Drivers yell all sorts of things at you while you wait to get onto the beach. The people of Posadas really lack a sense of tourism...I came to spend money and didn't feel any reciprocity.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9200897225069866922/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTNlpINUZREAE
